# Profilens köpcase: "Ser billigt ut – finns roliga triggers"

**Feed**: dagen-med-di  
**Published**: 2026-06-10  
**Market Sentiment**: Mixed

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

This episode features William Lindqvist from H.U.I. discussing a new retail/consumer business-cycle report, focusing on macroeconomic conditions in Sweden rather than individual stocks. The core theme is that Swedish households have regained purchasing power (low inflation, years of real wage growth, low rates) but lack confidence, with the Middle East war weighing on sentiment and driving precautionary saving. GDP growth is forecast at 2.3% for 2026 and 2.5% for 2027, but weak consumer confidence keeps consumption from taking off.

---

## Recommendations

_No signals for universe stocks in this episode._
